post.subject: Bourne Again
post.body: On Sunday I bought The Bourne Identity. Its such a great film. Matt Damon is such a great, intelligent actor! I was hangin on to my seat as they say. I loved every minute of it! Yesterday I rented The Bourne Supremacy. Its so good. So many twists. Absolutely fantistic. I cant wait for The Bourne Ultimatum! I wonder if i could read it before it comes out... I also rented Collateral yesterday. I had wanted to see this is the cinema, but didnt get a chance. I wish i had now. Its fucking unbelieveable. And the part where the dogs cross the road and Audioslave came on... ohhh god that was amazing, so touching! Im in the mood for more Matt Damon, might go back and watch Good Will Hunting now...
